# Generated by Nitrogen Modules. Do not edit.
# nitro_generator: 0.5.12
# Generated from: nitro_webgpu_present.native.dart
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.10)

set(NITRO_MODULE_NAME nitro_webgpu_present)

add_library(${NITRO_MODULE_NAME} SHARED
    # Bridge — generated by Nitrogen. Do not edit.
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../lib/src/generated/cpp/nitro_webgpu_present.bridge.g.cpp
    # Dart API DL — required by every Nitro module for Dart_PostCObject_DL.
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/dart_api_dl.c
)

set(NITRO_NATIVE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/native")
set(GENERATED_CPP "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../lib/src/generated/cpp")

target_include_directories(${NITRO_MODULE_NAME} PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
    ${GENERATED_CPP}
    ${NITRO_NATIVE}
)

target_compile_definitions(${NITRO_MODULE_NAME} PUBLIC DART_SHARED_LIB)

set_property(TARGET ${NITRO_MODULE_NAME} PROPERTY CXX_STANDARD 17)
set_property(TARGET ${NITRO_MODULE_NAME} PROPERTY CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

if(ANDROID)
    target_link_libraries(${NITRO_MODULE_NAME} PRIVATE android log)
elseif(WIN32)
    # No extra system libs — MSVC links the Universal CRT automatically.
    # dart_api_dl.c must be compiled as C (not C++) on MSVC:
    set_source_files_properties(
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/dart_api_dl.c
        PROPERTIES LANGUAGE C
    )
elseif(UNIX AND NOT APPLE)
    # Linux: libdl for dlopen, pthreads for IsolatePool worker threads.
    target_link_libraries(${NITRO_MODULE_NAME} PRIVATE dl pthread)
endif()

# nitro bridge checksum: a5e813d4df56b6a7
